query: SELECT u.name, u.email, p.territories, p.assignedBusinessLines, p.sectorFocus FROM users u JOIN user_profiles p ON p.userId = u.id WHERE u.name LIKE '%Ryan%' OR u.name LIKE '%Pemberton%';
